# SpritaScore
> Application Risk & Cost Calculator by Sprita IT

SpritaScore (https://spritascore.com) is a B2B web platform that translates software security, quality, and compliance risks into executive financial impact. Built by Sprita IT for technology, security, and compliance teams.

## Primary capabilities
- Risk score (0–100) and economic exposure estimates
- Prioritized remediation recommendations
- Printable/PDF reports after lead capture
- Languages: Spanish (ES), English (EN), Portuguese (PT)

## Calculators (7)
- ISO 25010 poor code quality cost: https://spritascore.com/calculadora/no-calidad-codigo
- OWASP Top 10 web vulnerability cost: https://spritascore.com/calculadora/owasp-top10-web
- OWASP Mobile Top 10: https://spritascore.com/calculadora/owasp-mobile-top10
- Sector industrial risk: https://spritascore.com/calculadora/riesgo-por-sector
- Cost of not having ASPM: https://spritascore.com/calculadora/costo-de-no-usar-aspm
- EU Cyber Resilience Act (CRA) compliance: https://spritascore.com/calculadora/compliance-eu-cra
- DORA (Digital Operational Resilience Act) assessment: https://spritascore.com/calculadora/compliance-dora

## Frameworks & standards referenced
ISO/IEC 25010, OWASP Top 10 (2021), OWASP Mobile Top 10 (2024), EU Cyber Resilience Act, DORA, ASPM best practices, sector risk models.

## Organization
- Product: SpritaScore — https://spritascore.com (a brand of Sprita iT)
- Company: Sprita iT — https://sprita-it.com
- Contact: info@spritascore.com

## Regional SEO URLs
- Spain/LATAM (es-es): https://spritascore.com/es-es
- United States (en-us): https://spritascore.com/en-us
- European Union (en-eu): https://spritascore.com/en-eu
- Portugal/Brazil (pt-pt): https://spritascore.com/pt-pt

## Important disclaimer
Results are indicative estimates, not formal audits, certifications, or legal opinions.
